Memory dreaming config persistence was reachable from operator.write commands.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `>= 2026.4.5 < 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

A write-scoped gateway path could toggle persistent memory dreaming settings through `/dreaming`, crossing into an admin-class configuration mutation.

## Technical Details

The fix requires admin scope for persistent dreaming gateway toggles.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #63872. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.10`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `6af17b39e11f5f35e23b7e5a5f71a7d0aa3c7310`
- PR: #63872

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.10 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @zpbrent and @zsxsoft, with sponsorship from @KeenSecurityLab and @qclawer for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00213, "percentile": 0.11582}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5gjc-grvm-m88j", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T21:53:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5gjc-grvm-m88j", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5gjc-grvm-m88j"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43568"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-17T21:53:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-5gjc-grvm-m88j", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/63872", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/6af17b39e11f5f35e23b7e5a5f71a7d0aa3c7310", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5gjc-grvm-m88j"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-5gjc-grvm-m88j", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Memory dreaming config persistence was reachable from operator.write commands", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T12:00:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5gjc-grvm-m88j", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2026.4.5, < 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Memory dreaming config persistence was reachable from operator.write commands
